description: Local emissive + outline on a specified zone of a target. Pre-existing renderer (highlighted_target representationMode).

expectedSourceShape.zone: optional sub-region within the target (used by spotlightOnHero)

output: Augments the target element with a `highlight_pulse` animation + a halo material override.

qualityBar.reference: Mustang air filter housing — translucent blue + outer halo + pulse on focus.
